title: AP Price Adjustment — Comprehensive Order Applicability + 5% Deadband
text_english: PRICE ADJUSTMENT (both POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE) under this Contract: (i) SHALL be applicable to all Works of Rs.{{pa_threshold_lakh}} LAKHS (default Rs.40 lakh) AND ABOVE where the ORIGINAL CONTRACT PERIOD as per agreement is {{pa_min_months}} (default 6) MONTHS OR MORE; (ii) SHALL NOT be applicable for works of Rs.{{pa_threshold_lakh}} lakh and above where the original period is LESS than {{pa_min_months}} months — Extensions of Time (EOT) shall NOT be counted for price adjustment; (iii) SHALL NOT be applicable for works LESS than Rs.{{pa_threshold_lakh}} lakh, irrespective of period of execution. Price Adjustment shall be ALLOWED only when the variation between estimated rates and current rates is MORE THAN {{deadband_pct}}% (default 5%) OR LESS THAN -{{deadband_pct}}% (default -5%); the amount payable/deductible shall be the differential after adding/deducting the initial {{deadband_pct}}% buffer over the rate adopted in the Estimate. TENDER PERCENTAGE (premium or discount, +/-) SHALL NOT be applied on the Price Adjustment amount. For EAP Works, Price Adjustment is applicable as defined in the Contract. (Source: GO Ms No 62, Water Resources (Reforms) Department, dated 30-11-2021 — supersedes all earlier department-specific orders.)
